6: 
7: # SystemVerilog 入门
8: 
9: > [!abstract] 概述
10: > SystemVerilog 是 Verilog 的扩展，集成了硬件描述语言（HDL）和硬件验证语言（HVL）特性。它是验证工程师的核心工具，主要用于：
11: 
12: - RTL 设计描述
13: - 高级验证方法学
14: - 覆盖率驱动验证
15: - 断言验证（SVA）
16: 
17: ## 基本语法结构
18: 
19: ### Module 定义
20: 
21: ```systemverilog
22: module tb_top;
23:     // 信号声明
24:     logic        clk;
25:     logic        rst_n;
26:     logic [31:0] data_in;
27:     logic [31:0] data_out;
28: 
29:     // 实例化 DUT
30:     dut u_dut (
31:         .clk      (clk),
32:         .rst_n    (rst_n),
33:         .data_in  (data_in),
34:         .data_out (data_out)
35:     );
36: 
37:     // 时钟生成
38:     initial begin
39:         clk = 0;
40:         forever #5 clk = ~clk;
41:     end
42: 
43:     // 测试逻辑
44:     initial begin
45:         rst_n = 0;
46:         #20 rst_n = 1;
47:         // ...
48:     end
49: endmodule
50: ```
51: 
52: ### 数据类型
53: 
54: | 类型 | 位宽 | 描述 |
55: |------|------|------|
56: | `logic` | 1bit | 单比特信号 |
57: | `bit` | 1bit | 无符号单比特 |
58: | `byte` | 8bit | 字节类型 |
59: | `int` | 32bit | 有符号整数 |
60: | `bit [31:0]` | 32bit | 无符号向量 |
61: 
62: ### 过程块
63: 
64: ```systemverilog
65: // 组合逻辑
66: always_comb begin
67:     out = a & b;
68: end
69: 
70: // 时序逻辑
71: always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
72:     if (rst_n == 0)
73:         q <= 0;
74:     else
75:         q <= d;
76: end
77: 
78: // 组合逻辑 always 块（兼容老代码）
79: always @(*) begin
80:     // 组合逻辑
81: end
82: ```
83: 
84: ## 与 Verilog 的区别
85: 
86: | 特性 | Verilog | SystemVerilog |
87: |------|---------|---------------|
88: | 变量声明 | `reg/wire` | `logic/var` |
89: | 4 值逻辑 | 支持 | 支持 |
90: | 2 值逻辑 | 不支持 | 支持 |
91: | 类和对象 | 不支持 | 支持 |
92: | 接口 | 不支持 | 支持 |
93: | 断言 | 基础 | 完整 SVA |
94: 
95: ## 常见错误
96: 
97: ### 1. 多驱动问题
98: 
99: ```systemverilog
100: // ❌ 错误：多个 always 块驱动同一信号
101: always @(posedge clk) q <= a;
102: always @(posedge clk) q <= b;
103: 
104: // ✅ 正确：使用优先级或选择逻辑
105: always @(posedge clk) begin
106:     if (sel) q <= a;
107:     else     q <= b;
108: end
109: ```
110: 
111: ### 2. 悬空信号
112: 
113: ```systemverilog
114: // ❌ 错误：output 未赋值
115: output [7:0] data_out;
116: 
117: // ✅ 正确：确保所有输出都有赋值
118: output logic [7:0] data_out;
119: ```
120:

5: ## 协议概览
6: 
7: 本知识库包含以下通信协议的详细文档：
8: 
9: | 协议 | 全称 | 类型 | 速度 | 应用场景 |
10: |------|------|------|------|----------|
11: | [[00-AXI\|AXI]] | Advanced eXtensible Interface | 并行高速 | 高 | SoC 片上互联 |
12: | [[00-APB\|APB]] | Advanced Peripheral Bus | 并行低速 | 低 | 外设配置 |
13: | [[00-I2C\|I2C]] | Inter-Integrated Circuit | 串行同步 | 低 | 传感器、EEPROM |
14: | [[00-SPI\|SPI]] | Serial Peripheral Interface | 串行同步 | 中 | Flash、ADC |
15: | [[00-UART\|UART]] | Universal Asynchronous Rx/Tx | 串行异步 | 低 | 调试串口 |
16: 
17: ## 协议对比
18: 
19: ### 总线类型对比
20: 
21: | 特性 | AXI | APB | I2C | SPI |
22: |------|-----|-----|-----|-----|
23: | 总线宽度 | 32/64/128/256 | 8/16/32 | N/A | N/A |
24: | 主从关系 | 1:N | 1:N | 多主多从 | 1:N |
25: | 时钟 | 独立时钟 | 同步时钟 | 同步 | 同步 |
26: | 地址空间 | 支持 | 无 | 无 | 无 |
27: | 突发传输 | 支持 | 不支持 | 不支持 | 不支持 |
28: | 数据流控制 |READY/VALID| PSEL/PENABLE | ACK | 无 |
29: | 典型频率 | 400MHz+ | 100MHz | 400kHz/3.4MHz | 50MHz+ |
30: 
31: ### 适用场景
32: 
33: ```
34: 高频数据传输 ──────────► AXI
35: 外设配置     ──────────► APB
36: 多设备互联   ──────────► I2C
37: 高速点对点   ──────────► SPI
38: 串口调试     ──────────► UART
39: ```
40: 
41: ## AXI 协议族
42: 
43: | 变体 | 说明 |
44: |------|------|
45: | AXI3 | 原始版本，32 位数据位宽 |
46: | AXI4 | 扩展突发长度，支持 4KB 边界 |
47: | AXI4-Lite | 单次传输，无突发 |
48: | AXI4-Stream | 仅数据流，无地址 |
49: 
50: 详见：[[00-AXI]]
51:

53: 
54: 详见：[[00-APB]]

57: 
58: | 特性 | I2C | SPI | UART |

60: | 线数 | 2 (SDA/SCL) | 4 (MOSI/MISO/SCK/CS) | 2 (TX/RX) |
61: | 主设备数 | 多主 | 单主 | 点对点 |
62: | 从设备数 | 多从 | 多从 | N/A |
63: | 数据方向 | 半双工 | 全双工 | 全双工 |

1: # Knowledge Base Auto-Classify Script
2: # Function: Auto scan and classify notes
3: 
4: param(
5:     [Parameter(Mandatory=$false)]
6:     [string]$Path = "D:\opencode\project\knowledge-base",
7: 
8:     [Parameter(Mandatory=$false)]
9:     [switch]$DryRun,
10: 
11:     [Parameter(Mandatory=$false)]
12:     [switch]$AutoTag
13: )
14: 
15: $ErrorActionPreference = "SilentlyContinue"
16: 
17: Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
18: Write-Host "         Knowledge Base Auto-Classify v1.0" -ForegroundColor Cyan
19: Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
20: Write-Host ""
21: 
22: # Classification rules
23: $rules = @{
24:     "UVM" = @("uvm_", "sequence", "driver", "monitor", "agent", "sequencer", "factory", "phase")
25:     "AXI" = @("axi", "awvalid", "arvalid", "wvalid", "bvalid", "rvalid", "burst", "transaction")
26:     "AMBA" = @("ahb", "apb", "amba", "arbiter", "master", "slave")
27:     "PCIe" = @("pcie", "pci express", "tlp", "dllp", "transaction layer")
28:     "DDR" = @("ddr", "sdram", "memory", "bank", "row", "column", "refresh")
29:     "Ethernet" = @("ethernet", "mac", "phy", "tcp", "udp", "ip")
30:     "Coverage" = @("coverage", "covergroup", "coverpoint", "cross coverage")
31:     "Assertion" = @("assertion", "property", "sequence", "assume", "cover")
32:     "Protocol" = @("protocol", "handshake", "frame", "packet")
33: }
34: 
35: # Statistics
36: $stats = @{}
37: 
38: # Scan files
39: $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -Recurse -Include "*.md" -File | Where-Object {
40:     $_.Name -notlike "00-*"
41: }
42: 
43: Write-Host "Scanning... Found $($files.Count) note files" -ForegroundColor Green
44: Write-Host ""
45: 
46: $autoClassified = 0
47: $autoTagged = 0
48: 
49: foreach ($file in $files) {
50:     $content = Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -Raw -Encoding UTF8
51:     $contentLower = $content.ToLower()
52: 
53:     $matchedCategories = @()
54: 
55:     foreach ($category in $rules.Keys) {
56:         foreach ($keyword in $rules[$category]) {
57:             if ($contentLower -like "*$keyword*") {
58:                 if ($matchedCategories -notcontains $category) {
59:                     $matchedCategories += $category
60:                 }
61:                 break
62:             }
63:         }
64:     }
65: 
66:     # Auto add tags
67:     if ($AutoTag -and $matchedCategories.Count -gt 0) {
68:         $header = Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -First 5
69:         $hasTags = $header | Where-Object { $_ -match "^tags:" -or $_ -match "^---" }
70: 
71:         if ($hasTags) {
72:             $tagsLine = "tags: " + ($matchedCategories -join ", ")
73:             $content = Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -Encoding UTF8
74:             $content = $content -replace '(?i)^tags:.*', $tagsLine
75:             if ($DryRun) {
76:                 Write-Host "[DryRun] Would add tags: $tagsLine to $($file.Name)" -ForegroundColor Yellow
77:             } else {
78:                 $content | Set-Content -Path $file.FullName -Encoding UTF8
79:                 Write-Host "[Tagged] $($file.Name) -> $($matchedCategories -join ', ')" -ForegroundColor Cyan
80:             }
81:             $autoTagged++
82:         }
83:     }
84: 
85:     # Statistics
86:     foreach ($cat in $matchedCategories) {
87:         if (-not $stats.ContainsKey($cat)) {
88:             $stats[$cat] = 0
89:         }
90:         $stats[$cat]++
91:     }
92: 
93:     $autoClassified++
94: }
95: 
96: Write-Host ""
97: Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
98: Write-Host "Classification complete!" -ForegroundColor Green
99: Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
100: Write-Host ""
101: Write-Host "Statistics:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
102: Write-Host ""
103: 
104: foreach ($key in $stats.Keys | Sort-Object -Descending) {
105:     Write-Host "  $($key): $($stats[$key]) files" -ForegroundColor White
106: }
107: 
108: Write-Host ""
109: Write-Host "Total: $autoClassified files classified, $autoTagged files tagged"
110: 
111: if ($DryRun) {
112:     Write-Host ""
113:     Write-Host "[DryRun mode] No files were actually modified" -ForegroundColor Yellow
114: }

1: # UVM Phase 机制
2: 
3: > UVM的12个phase及其执行顺序
4: 
5: ## Phase 执行顺序图
6: 
7: ```
8: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
9: │                    Build Phases (Top-Down)                   │
10: │  ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐              │
11: │  │build_phase│←──│connect_  │←──│env._phase│              │
12: │  │ (Top→Bot)│   │ phase    │   │           │              │
13: │  └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └──────────┘              │
14: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
15: 
16: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
17: │                    Run Phases (Bottom-Up)                     │
18: │  ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌───────┐ │
19: │  │reset_phase│──→│configure_│──→│main_phase│──→│shutdown│ │
20: │  │          │   │  phase    │   │          │   │_phase │ │
21: │  └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └───────┘ │
22: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
23: 
24: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
25: │                    Cleanup Phases (Bottom-Up)                 │
26: │  ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐              │
27: │  │extract_   │←──│check_    │←──│report_   │              │
28: │  │phase      │   │phase     │   │phase     │              │
29: │  └──────────┘    └──────────┘    └──────────┘              │
30: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
31: ```
32: 
33: ---
34: 
35: ## 详细说明
36: 
37: ### 1. Build Phases
38: 
39: | Phase | 方向 | 用途 |
40: |-------|------|------|
41: | `build_phase` | Top-Down | 创建组件、设置配置 |
42: | `connect_phase` | Bottom-Up | 连接TLM端口 |
43: | `end_of_elaboration_phase` | Bottom-Up | 最终检查 |
44: 
45: ### 2. Run Phases
46: 
47: ```systemverilog
48: // 推荐使用 main_phase
49: task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
50:     phase.raise_objection(this);
51:     `uvm_info("TAG", "Starting test...", UVM_LOW)
52:     // 测试逻辑
53:     phase.drop_objection(this);
54: endtask
55: ```
56: 
57: ### 3. Cleanup Phases
58: 
59: ```systemverilog
60: function void extract_phase(uvm_phase phase);
61:     int cov;
62:     super.extract_phase(phase);
63:     uvm_config_db#(int)::get(this, "", "coverage", cov);
64: endfunction
65: 
66: function void report_phase(uvm_phase phase);
67:     super.report_phase(phase);
68:     if (uvm_report_info.get_id() == "TEST")
69:         $display("Test passed");
70: endfunction
71: ```
72:

74: 
75: ## Objection 机制
76: 
77: ```systemverilog
78: task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
79:     phase.raise_objection(this);
80:     `uvm_info("RUN", "Starting...", UVM_MEDIUM)
81:     // 测试
82:     phase.drop_objection(this);
83: endtask
84: ```
85: 
86: ---
87: 
88: ## 常见错误
89: 
90: ```systemverilog
91: // 错误1：忘记raise objection
92: task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
93:     // 不会执行，phase立即结束
94: endtask
95: 
96: // 错误2：忘记drop objection
97: task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
98:     phase.raise_objection(this);
99:     // 测试完成后忘记drop
100: endtask
101: 
102: // 错误3：在build_phase中使用raise_objection
103: function void build_phase(uvm_phase phase);
104:     phase.raise_objection(this);  // 错误！
105: endfunction
106: ```

1: # Linux 常用命令
2: 
3: > 数字IC验证工程师必备的Linux操作
4: 
5: ## 📁 文件操作
6: 
7: ### 浏览文件/目录
8: 
9: ```bash
10: # 列出目录内容
11: ls -la                    # 详细列表
12: ls -lh                    # 人性化大小
13: ls -lt                    # 按时间排序
14: ls -S                     # 按大小排序
15: ls -a                     # 显示隐藏文件
16: 
17: # 切换目录
18: cd ~                      # 回家目录
19: cd -                      # 上一个目录
20: cd ..                     # 上级目录
21: cd /path/to/dir           # 绝对路径
22: 
23: # 查看当前目录
24: pwd                       # 打印工作目录
25: ```
26: 
27: ### 文件操作
28: 
29: ```bash
30: # 复制
31: cp file1 file2           # 复制文件
32: cp -r dir1 dir2           # 复制目录
33: cp file1 dir/             # 复制到目录
34: 
35: # 移动/重命名
36: mv file1 file2           # 重命名
37: mv file1 dir/            # 移动到目录
38: 
39: # 删除
40: rm file                  # 删除文件
41: rm -rf dir               # 强制删除目录
42: rm -i file               # 交互式删除
43: 
44: # 创建
45: touch file               # 创建空文件
46: mkdir -p dir/subdir      # 创建目录树
47: mkdir -m 755 dir         # 指定权限
48: 
49: # 查找
50: find . -name "*.v"       # 查找SV文件
51: find . -name "*.sv" -mtime -7  # 7天内修改的
52: find . -size +100M        # 大于100M的文件
53: grep -r "pattern" .       # 递归搜索
54: grep -n "pattern" file    # 显示行号
55: ```
56: 
57: ---
58: 
59: ## 🔧 文件查看
60: 
61: ### 文本查看
62: 
63: ```bash
64: # 查看文件
65: cat file                  # 全部显示
66: cat -n file              # 显示行号
67: less file                 # 分页查看
68: head -20 file            # 前20行
69: tail -20 file            # 后20行
70: tail -f log.txt          # 实时跟踪
71: 
72: # 统计
73: wc -l file               # 行数
74: wc -w file               # 单词数
75: wc -c file               # 字符数
76: 
77: # 比较
78: diff file1 file2         # 比较文件
79: vimdiff file1 file2      # vim比较
80: ```
81: 
82: ---
83: 
84: ## 📦 压缩/解压
85: 
86: ```bash
87: # tar压缩
88: tar -cvf archive.tar dir/       # 压缩
89: tar -xvf archive.tar              # 解压
90: tar -czvf archive.tar.gz dir/     # gzip压缩
91: tar -xzvf archive.tar.gz          # gzip解压
92: 
93: # zip
94: zip -r archive.zip dir/           # 压缩
95: unzip archive.zip                 # 解压
96: ```
97: 
98: ---
99: 
100: ## 🔐 权限管理
101: 
102: ```bash
103: # 权限格式: rwx rwx rwx (owner group other)
104: # r=4, w=2, x=1
105: 
106: chmod 755 file                   # rwxr-xr-x
107: chmod +x script.sh               # 添加执行权限
108: chmod -R 644 *.txt              # 递归设置
109: 
110: chown user:group file            # 更改所有者
111: chgrp group file                 # 更改组
112: ```
113: 
114: ---
115: 
116: ## 🌐 网络命令
117: 
118: ```bash
119: # 网络
120: ping host                       # 测试连接
121: ifconfig                        # 查看IP
122: netstat -tuln                   # 监听端口
123: ssh user@host                   # 远程登录
124: scp file user@host:/path         # 远程复制
125: 
126: # 下载
127: wget url                        # 下载
128: curl -O url                     # 下载
129: curl -X POST url                # POST请求
130: ```
131: 
132: ---
133: 
134: ## ⚙️ 系统命令
135: 
136: ```bash
137: # 进程
138: ps aux                          # 查看进程
139: ps -ef | grep process           # 查找进程
140: kill -9 PID                     # 强制终止
141: top                             # 任务管理器
142: htop                            # 增强top
143: 
144: # 内存/磁盘
145: free -h                         # 内存
146: df -h                          # 磁盘
147: du -sh dir                     # 目录大小
148: 
149: # 其他
150: date                            # 日期时间
151: whoami                          # 用户名
152: hostname                        # 主机名
153: history                         # 命令历史
154: alias ll='ls -la'              # 设置别名
155: ```
156: 
157: ---
158: 
159: ## 🔧 仿真相关
160: 
161: ```bash
162: # 编译仿真
163: make                           # 执行Makefile
164: make clean                     # 清理
165: make compile                   # 编译
166: 
167: # 文件操作
168: cat filelist.f                # 查看文件列表
169: grep -n "module" *.v           # 查找模块
170: 
171: # 波形
172: verdi -sv -f filelist.f &     # 打开Verdi
173: dve -vpd wave.vpd &            # 打开DVE
174: 
175: # 日志
176: grep -i error sim.log         # 查找错误
177: grep -i warning sim.log        # 查找警告
178: tail -f sim.log                # 实时跟踪
179: ```
180: 
181: ---
182: 
183: ## 📝 文本处理
184: 
185: ```bash
186: # 管道与重定向
187: command > output.txt            # 输出到文件
188: command >> output.txt           # 追加
189: command 2>&1                   # 错误合并输出
190: command1 | command2            # 管道
191: 
192: # sed流编辑器
193: sed -i 's/old/new/g' file     # 替换
194: sed -n '10,20p' file          # 10-20行
195: 
196: # awk
197: awk '{print $1}' file          # 第一列
198: awk -F: '{print $1}' file      # 指定分隔符
199: 
200: # 排序去重
201: sort file | uniq              # 去重
202: sort -k2 file                 # 按第2列排序
203: ```
204: 
205: ---
206: 
207: ## 🚀 快捷技巧
208: 
209: ```bash
210: # 命令历史
211: !!                          # 上一条命令
212: !n                          # 第n条命令
213: !string                     # 最近以string开头的
214: Ctrl+R                      # 反向搜索
215: 
216: # 自动补全
217: Tab                         # 自动补全
218: Tab Tab                     # 显示所有选项
219: 
220: # 光标移动
221: Ctrl+A                      # 行首
222: Ctrl+E                      # 行尾
223: Ctrl+U                      # 删除整行
224: Ctrl+K                      # 删除到行尾
225: Ctrl+L                      # 清屏
226: ```
